Headline: Blue Line Experiencing Delays; Boarding change between UIC/Halsted and LaSalle
ShortDescription: Blue Line service running w/delays due to a mechanical problem near LaSalle; board all trains on the Forest Park-bound side at UIC/Halsted and LaSalle.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Blue Line service is running with delays due to a mechanical problem near LaSalle.

Trains, in both directions, are running on the same track between UIC/Halsted and LaSalle stations.

Board/exit all trains on the Forest Park-bound side of the platform at UIC/Halsted and LaSalle.

At this time, also consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes, or using buses to other rail lines.

These may include:

#7 Harrison
#22 Clark
#156 Lasalle

We're working to restore normal service as quickly as possible. Allow extra travel time.
